headline: DICK'S Sporting Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Comparable Sales Up 6%
summary: DKS posts Q1 results with sales strength from the Foot Locker addition and healthy comps, but earnings slip and come in just shy of expectations

headline: Capri Holdings Beats Q4 Earnings Estimates, Sees FY27 Growth Ahead
summary: CPRI projects FY27 revenue and EPS growth after Q4 earnings beat estimates, as Michael Kors and Jimmy Choo show improving trends.

headline: CEO John Idol Said Capri Holdings Is Ready to Build Again
summary: The company fought its way nearly back to breakeven in the fourth quarter and is projecting growth this fiscal year.

headline: Consumers are being 'highly selective' on what they want, says TD Cowen’s Oliver Chen
summary: Oliver Chen, senior equity research analyst at TD Cowen, joins ‘Squawk on the Street’ to discuss the impact of inflation on retailers, how retailers are adopting AI tech, and more.

headline: Amazon starts selling its AI shopping technology to other retailers
summary: Amazon said it's already signed up Kate Spade as a customer for its AI shopping technology.
